multi_config.ui:help: Upload the cellranger multi config CSV for this pool (one pool per run). Must contain [gene-expression], [feature], [libraries], and [samples] sections.

feature_reference.ui:help: Upload the merged feature reference CSV — HTO hashtags + TotalSeq-B (or any CITE-seq) antibody rows. IDs must not contain whitespace or parentheses.

gex_reference_url.ui:help: URL or s3:// URI to a 10x GEX reference tarball. Default is human GRCh38 2024-A. The pipeline downloads this fresh each run.

run_id.ui:help: Name for this run's output directory (e.g., Pool1_CD138_Neg). Must be unique per dataset.

fastq_pattern.ui:help: Glob filter applied when copying FASTQ objects from the input dataset onto the worker. Default *.fastq.gz stages everything. Use e.g. 'Pool1_*' to stage only one pool's files.

create_bam.ui:help: If checked, cellranger writes position-sorted BAMs (adds tens of GB per sample). Off by default.

cpus.ui:help: localcores for cellranger. Match to the Batch instance vCPU count.

memory_gb.ui:help: localmem for cellranger (GB). Match to the Batch instance memory, leaving ~8 GB headroom.

disk_gb.ui:help: Scratch space for the worker. Cellranger multi keeps MAKE_SHARD + alignment intermediates simultaneously; budget ~5x the FASTQ input size.

form.title: Valinor Cellranger Multi
form.description: Run cellranger multi (GEX + CITE-seq + HTO demultiplexing) against an input FASTQ dataset on AWS Batch. One pool per run.

multi_config.title: Multi Config CSV
multi_config.description: cellranger multi config CSV for this pool

feature_reference.title: Feature Reference CSV
feature_reference.description: Feature reference CSV — HTO + CITE-seq antibody rows. IDs must not contain whitespace or parens.

gex_reference_url.title: GEX Reference URL
gex_reference_url.description: HTTPS URL or s3:// URI to the 10x GEX reference tarball (downloaded fresh each run)

run_id.title: Run ID
run_id.description: Output directory name for this run (e.g., Pool1_CD138_Neg)

fastq_pattern.title: FASTQ Pattern
fastq_pattern.description: Glob filter for which files to stage from the input dataset

create_bam.title: Create BAM
create_bam.description: Write position-sorted BAM files (large; off by default)
